metadata.description: Sample customer support tickets for NexusFlow Customer Success Digital FTE training and testing

tickets.subject: Can't export Gantt chart to PDF
tickets.message:
Hi NexusFlow team,

I've been trying to export our Q2 roadmap Gantt chart to PDF for an executive presentation tomorrow, but every time I click export, it just shows a loading spinner and nothing happens.

I've tried:
- Different browsers (Chrome and Firefox)
- Clearing cache
- Reducing the number of visible tasks

Still the same issue. This is pretty urgent - can someone help?

Thanks,
Michael
Hey! Quick question - how do I set up recurring tasks for our weekly team meetings? Can't find the option 🤔

tickets.subject: SSO integration not working after update
tickets.message:
Our IT team updated our SAML configuration yesterday and now none of our 200+ users can log in through SSO. They get an error saying 'Identity provider not configured correctly.'

This is blocking our entire organization. We need immediate assistance. Our SSO admin is available for a call if needed.

Ticket priority: CRITICAL

tickets.subject: Love the product! One feature request
tickets.message:
Hello!

We just started using NexusFlow last week and I'm already obsessed! The interface is so much cleaner than Asana.

One thing I'd love to see: the ability to add custom fields to tasks. We track things like 'Client Name', 'Project Type', and 'Budget' and it would be amazing to have these as native fields.

Is this on your roadmap? Thanks for building such a great tool!

Best,
Emily
Hi, I was charged twice for this month's subscription. Can you check? Transaction IDs: TXN-98765 and TXN-98766

tickets.subject: Need help with advanced reporting setup
tickets.message:
Hi Support Team,

We're trying to set up custom dashboards for our leadership team but I'm struggling with the calculated fields. Specifically:

1. How do I create a formula that shows task completion rate by assignee?
2. Can I filter reports by custom tags?
3. Is there a way to schedule automatic report delivery?

Would appreciate a walkthrough if possible. Happy to schedule a call.

Thanks,
Lisa Thompson
VP of Operations

tickets.subject: Data export for compliance audit
tickets.message:
We have a SOC 2 audit coming up and need to export all audit logs and user activity data for the past 12 months.

What's the best way to do this? The standard export seems to only give 90 days.

Please advise urgently - audit starts next week.
The mobile app keeps crashing when I try to attach photos to tasks. iPhone 14, iOS 17.3. Already tried reinstalling 😤

tickets.subject: Integration with Shopify not syncing
tickets.message:
Hello,

Our Shopify integration stopped syncing orders yesterday around 3 PM PST. New orders are not appearing in our 'Orders' project.

I've tried:
- Disconnecting and reconnecting the integration
- Checking API permissions
- Verifying webhook URLs

Nothing works. This is affecting our order fulfillment workflow.

Carlos Mendez
Operations Manager

tickets.subject: Request for training session for new team members
tickets.message:
Hi,

We have 15 new team members joining next week and would like to schedule a group training session on NexusFlow best practices.

Can someone from your team do a 1-hour Zoom walkthrough? We're particularly interested in:
- Project templates
- Time tracking
- Reporting features

Please let us know availability for the week of March 10th.

Thank you!

tickets.subject: Question about upgrading to paid plan
tickets.message:
Hi there,

I've been testing the free plan and really like it. Before I upgrade, I have a few questions:

1. If I upgrade to Professional, will I keep all my existing projects and data?
2. Can I downgrade later if needed?
3. Do you offer educational discounts? I'm a student using this for my capstone project.

Thanks!
Tom
Is there a way to see who viewed a task? Like a read receipt? Need to know if my team is actually checking their assignments 👀

tickets.subject: Bulk task import failing
tickets.message:
Trying to import 500+ tasks from a CSV file and it keeps failing at around 60% with 'Error: Invalid date format in row 312.'

I've checked row 312 multiple times and the date format looks correct (YYYY-MM-DD). I've attached the CSV file.

Can someone help identify the issue?

Kevin O'Brien
Project Coordinator

tickets.subject: Timezone handling in scheduled reports
tickets.message:
Hello Support,

We have team members across US, Europe, and India. When we schedule daily digest reports, they all arrive at 9 AM PST which is midnight for our India team.

Is there a way to set timezone per user for scheduled reports? Or can each user set their own delivery time?

This would really help with adoption in our global team.

Best regards,
Priya Patel
Engineering Director
URGENT: All my tasks disappeared from the board! Did I accidentally delete something? This has all our active shipments 😱

tickets.subject: French language support
tickets.message:
Bonjour,

Est-ce que NexusFlow sera disponible en français bientôt? Mon équipe aurait beaucoup de mal avec l'anglais.

Merci,
Sophie

tickets.subject: API rate limit increase request
tickets.message:
Hi,

We're building a custom integration that syncs NexusFlow with our internal ERP system. We're hitting the API rate limit (600 req/min) during initial data sync.

Can we get this increased to 2000 req/min? We're on Enterprise plan.

Technical contact: dev-team@techcorp.com

Thanks,
Daniel Lee
CTO
How do I add someone as a guest? They only need to see one project, not the whole workspace.

tickets.subject: Free plan limitation question
tickets.message:
Hey,

I hit the 3-project limit on the free plan. If I upgrade to Starter for one month, create all my projects, then downgrade back to free - will my projects be deleted?

Just trying to understand the limitations before committing.

Thanks!
Alex

tickets.subject: Security questionnaire for vendor approval
tickets.message:
Hello,

Our security team requires all vendors to complete a security questionnaire before contract renewal. I've attached the document (25 questions).

Can someone from your security team complete this by March 20th?

This is required for our contract renewal process.

Christina Wang
Procurement Manager

tickets.subject: Performance issues with large projects
tickets.message:
Hi Team,

We have a project with about 2,000 tasks (property listings) and the page takes 30+ seconds to load. This is making it almost unusable.

Is there a recommended limit for tasks per project? Should we be splitting this into multiple projects?

Any performance tips would be appreciated.

Ryan Mitchell
IT Manager
Can I connect my Google Calendar so deadlines show up there? 📅

tickets.subject: Need invoice with company VAT number
tickets.message:
Hello,

Our accounting department needs invoices to include our VAT number: GB123456789

Can you update our billing profile and resend the last 3 invoices with the correct VAT information?

Company: Cooper Manufacturing Ltd
Account ID: ACC-78901

Thank you,
Brian Cooper
Finance Director

tickets.subject: Nonprofit discount application
tickets.message:
Dear NexusFlow,

I saw on your website that you offer 50% discounts for nonprofits. We're a registered 501(c)(3) organization.

How do I apply for this discount? Our current plan renews next month.

I can provide our determination letter if needed.

With gratitude,
Michelle Taylor
Executive Director
The Slack notifications are spamming our channel! Every single task update is posting. How do I filter this?

tickets.subject: Audit log export for legal discovery
tickets.message:
Counsel here. We're involved in litigation and need to export complete audit logs for specific projects as part of legal discovery.

This needs to be in a format admissible in court (with timestamps, user IDs, and action details).

Please have your legal/compliance team contact me urgently.

Laura Hernandez, Esq.
General Counsel

tickets.subject: Can't assign tasks to team members
tickets.message:
When I try to assign a task to someone, their name doesn't appear in the dropdown. They are definitely members of the workspace.

I've tried:
- Refreshing the page
- Logging out and back in
- Different browser

Still not working. Help please!

Steven
Just wanted to say your support team is AMAZING! Got help within minutes yesterday. This is how customer service should be done! 🙌

tickets.subject: GDPR data deletion request
tickets.message:
Hello,

Under GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure), I'm requesting deletion of all personal data for a former employee: john.doe@email.com

He left our company on March 1st and we need his data removed from your systems.

Please confirm once completed.

Patrick O'Sullivan
HR Director

tickets.subject: Feature request: Album release checklist template
tickets.message:
Hi!

We use NexusFlow to manage all our album releases. It would be SO helpful if you had a pre-built template for album release workflows.

Typical tasks: mastering, artwork, distribution, PR, social media, playlist pitching, etc.

Would love to see this added!

Diana Ross (no relation to THE Diana Ross 😄)
Label Manager

tickets.subject: Dedicated instance pricing inquiry
tickets.message:
Dear NexusFlow,

We're interested in a dedicated/single-tenant instance for regulatory reasons. Can you provide pricing information?

Requirements:
- Dedicated database
- Isolated infrastructure
- Custom SLA (99.99%)
- Dedicated support channel

Estimated users: 500

Please have your enterprise sales team reach out.

George Hamilton
CTO
Is there a dark mode? My eyes are dying during late night writing sessions 🌙👀

tickets.subject: Russian language support
tickets.message:
Здравствуйте!

Планируется ли поддержка русского языка в интерфейсе? Нашей команде было бы намного удобнее работать на русском.

Спасибо,
Виктор Петров

tickets.subject: Student discount for research project
tickets.message:
Hello,

I'm a professor leading a research project with 20 graduate students. We're interested in using NexusFlow for project coordination.

Do you offer educational/research discounts? Our budget is limited but this could lead to wider adoption across the university.

Dr. Samantha Clark
Associate Professor of Computer Science
Need to add 10 more seats to our account ASAP. What's the process?

tickets.subject: File storage limit reached
tickets.message:
Hi,

We've hit our storage limit (100GB) and can't upload any more script PDFs and storyboards.

Options:
1. Upgrade to Business plan?
2. Purchase additional storage?
3. Delete old files (not ideal for archive purposes)

What do you recommend for a film production team?

Thanks!
Natalie

tickets.subject: Mobile app offline mode
tickets.message:
Our restaurant managers often have poor connectivity in basements/storage areas. Is there an offline mode for the mobile app?

They need to be able to check task lists and mark items complete even without internet.

William Chang
Operations Director

tickets.subject: Custom branding for client portal
tickets.message:
Buongiorno,

We use NexusFlow to collaborate with external design partners. Is there a way to white-label the interface with our brand colors and logo when sharing projects externally?

This would enhance the client experience significantly.

Isabella Ferrari
Creative Director
Accidentally deleted an entire project! Is there a way to restore it? 😰

tickets.subject: Teaching license for classroom use
tickets.message:
Hello,

I teach a project management course and would like to use NexusFlow as a teaching tool for my 30 students.

Do you offer educational licenses for classroom training? Students would only need access for one semester.

Chef Monica Geller
Instructor

tickets.subject: Board meeting - usage report request
tickets.message:
Team,

Need a comprehensive usage report for our board meeting next week:
- Active users by department
- Project completion rates
- Time tracking summaries
- ROI metrics if available

Can your team prepare this by March 26th?

Thanks,
Richard
Love the new AI features! 🎉 Quick question - can the AI suggest task dependencies automatically?

tickets.subject: Custom integration with internal tools
tickets.message:
We need to build a bidirectional sync between NexusFlow and our proprietary mission planning system.

Requirements:
- Real-time webhook events
- Custom field mappings
- Batch API access for historical data
- Dedicated technical account manager

Let's schedule a technical discussion.

Elon Musk
CEO

tickets.subject: Content production workflow template
tickets.message:
Dear NexusFlow,

We produce multiple TV shows and podcasts simultaneously. Each has similar phases: pre-production, filming, editing, post-production, distribution.

Do you have templates for media production workflows? Or can someone help us build a custom template?

Oprah Winfrey
Chairwoman
Our foundation tracks grants across 50 countries. Can we filter reports by geographic region?

tickets.subject: Security review meeting request
tickets.message:
NexusFlow Security Team,

We need to schedule an annual security review meeting before our SOC 2 recertification.

Topics:
- Penetration testing results
- Incident response procedures
- Data encryption standards
- Business continuity plans

Please propose dates in early April.

Jeff Bezos
Founder

tickets.subject: AI model training data access
tickets.message:
Hi,

We're interested in partnering to train AI models on anonymized project management patterns from NexusFlow data.

Is this something your data science team would be open to discussing?

This could improve AI features for everyone.

Mark Zuckerberg
CEO

tickets.subject: Multi-subsidiary account structure
tickets.message:
Team,

We manage 80+ subsidiaries and need a way to have separate workspaces under one corporate account with consolidated billing.

Is this possible with your Enterprise plan?

Warren Buffett
Chairman
Follow-up on the custom integration - when can we start the technical discussion? This is time-sensitive for our Q2 launch.

tickets.subject: Enterprise contract renewal negotiation
tickets.message:
NexusFlow Team,

Our Enterprise contract is up for renewal in June. We'd like to discuss:
- Volume pricing for 5,000+ seats
- Multi-year discount
- Custom feature development for our workflow
- On-premise deployment option

Let's schedule executive-level discussions.

Tim Cook
CEO

tickets.subject: Strategic partnership discussion
tickets.message:
Dear NexusFlow Leadership,

Microsoft is interested in exploring a strategic partnership that could include:
- Deep Teams integration
- Azure marketplace listing
- Co-selling opportunities
- Potential investment

Let's set up a call between our business development teams.

Satya Nadella
CEO
Our team loves NexusFlow! Would love to discuss Google Workspace integration possibilities. Who should I connect with?

tickets.subject: GPU-accelerated analytics feature request
tickets.message:
Hi NexusFlow,

We'd love to discuss how NVIDIA's GPU technology could accelerate your AI features and analytics engine.

Potential collaboration:
- GPU-optimized data processing
- Real-time dashboard rendering
- AI model inference acceleration

Interested in exploring this?

Jensen Huang
CEO

tickets.subject: Competitive analysis - NexusFlow vs Jira
tickets.message:
Hello,

We're currently evaluating project management tools for company-wide deployment (10,000+ users). Currently using Jira but considering a switch.

Can you provide a detailed comparison of NexusFlow vs Jira, specifically for hardware development workflows?

Lisa Su
CEO
Hey! Our Salesforce + NexusFlow integration is seeing huge demand. Can we discuss making this a native, first-party integration? 🚀
